chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-1586 of 2025 C.P No.D-1587 of 2025 C.P No.D-1588 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 17.10.2025 Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto Additional A.G Sindh a/w SIP Faheem Hussain, SIP Ali Khan Noonari and ASI Muhammad Yaseen Mr. Siraj Ahmed Bijarani, Assistant P.G Sindh *** Mr. Nabi Bux advocate, holding brief on behalf of Mr. Sagar Ali Sahito, seeks adjournment on the ground that latter is out of station. Ms. Mahjabeen Katiar advocate files vakalatnamas on behalf of the complainant in all three petitions, which are taken on record. Learned Additional A.G files statements/comments on behalf of the respondents police officials, which are taken on record. Learned Additional A.G and Assistant P.G submit that these matters relate to an injury case and the challan in the matters has been submitted by the Investigation Officer before the trial Court, therefore, these petitions have become infructuous and liable to be dismissed in view of the dicta laid down by the Supreme Court in the case of Director City Circle GEPCO Ltd and others vs. Shahid Mir and others [PLD 2013 SC 403]. In view of the position of the case, these petitions have become infructuous and the same stand disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
